meta.title: About Us — PT Victorindo Kimiatama
meta.description: Since 1978, PT Victorindo Kimiatama has grown from Indonesia's first automotive paint specialist into a nationally recognized world-class coating manufacturer.

hero.heading: Our Story & Heritage
hero.lede: PT Victorindo Kimiatama is Indonesia's first trusted specialist in automotive paint and coating solutions — one of Indonesia's long-established coating manufacturers since 1978, delivering excellent coating products across multiple industries.

heritage.heading: Proudly Made in Indonesia
heritage.para: Since its establishment in 1978 in Palmerah, Jakarta, PT Victorindo Kimiatama has grown from Indonesia's first automotive paint specialist into a nationally recognized world-class coating manufacturer, driven by over four decades of innovation and dedication.
heritage.imageAlt: Aerial view of the PT Victorindo Kimiatama factory complex in Karawang

commitment.label: Our Commitment
commitment.quote: "To deliver high-quality, innovative, durable, and certified coating solutions that empower industries across Indonesia."

vision.heading: Purpose & Direction
vision.visionText: To become the leading national coating solutions manufacturer, recognized for innovation, quality, and sustainability — trusted across Indonesia and beyond.

missions.title: Quality First
missions.desc: Deliver coating products that consistently meet and exceed international standards through rigorous quality management.

missions.title: Innovation Driven
missions.desc: Continuously invest in R&D to develop superior formulations that address evolving industry needs.

missions.title: Sustainable Growth
missions.desc: Build long-term partnerships grounded in trust, reliability, and shared progress with our clients and communities.

missions.title: National Pride
missions.desc: Champion Indonesian manufacturing excellence by producing world-class products entirely within the country.

journey.heading: Growth Journey
journey.lede: Since its establishment in 1978 in Palmerah, Jakarta, PT Victorindo Kimiatama has grown from Indonesia's first automotive paint specialist into a nationally recognized world-class coating manufacturer.

items.title: Established in Palmerah, Jakarta
items.desc: PT Victorindo Kimiatama is founded as Indonesia's first automotive paint specialist.

items.title: Supply New Armada Karoseri
items.desc: VK becomes a trusted paint supplier to New Armada, one of Indonesia's leading karoseri manufacturers.

items.title: Supply to Automotive Body Builders Across Indonesia
items.desc: Distribution expands to serve automotive body builders throughout the archipelago.

items.title: Factory Relocation — Kembangan
items.desc: Production capacity grows with the relocation of the factory to Kembangan.

items.title: PT Hartono Istana Teknologi
items.desc: VK is appointed as a coating partner for PT Hartono Istana Teknologi.

items.title: Factory Relocation — Bekasi
items.desc: Continued growth drives a second factory relocation to Bekasi.

items.title: ISO 9000 Certification
items.desc: VK achieves ISO 9000 certification, formalizing its quality management system.

items.title: PT Toyota Astra Motor (TAM)
items.desc: VK begins supplying coating solutions to PT Toyota Astra Motor.

items.title: PT Isuzu Astra Motor Indonesia
items.desc: The OEM client portfolio grows with PT Isuzu Astra Motor Indonesia.

items.title: Karawang Factory
items.desc: VK establishes its modern manufacturing facility in Karawang, Jawa Barat — the company's current home.

items.title: Certified ISO 9001:2015
items.desc: The quality management system is upgraded and certified to the ISO 9001:2015 standard.

items.title: Sub-Con Suzuki
items.desc: VK is trusted as a sub-contractor coating supplier for Suzuki.

items.title: PT LG Electronics Indonesia
items.desc: Coating solutions expand into the electronics manufacturing sector with PT LG Electronics Indonesia.

items.title: PT Tayoh Helm Industri
items.desc: VK supplies specialty coatings to PT Tayoh Helm Industri.

items.title: PT KJS (Kreasindo Jayatama Sukses)
items.desc: Partnership established with PT Kreasindo Jayatama Sukses.

items.title: Transjakarta — TKDN Certification
items.desc: VK earns TKDN certification and supports Transjakarta's public transportation fleet.

items.title: Certification ISO 9001, ISO 14001 & ISO 45001
items.desc: Triple ISO certification confirms VK's commitment to quality, environmental responsibility, and occupational health & safety.

journey.sideImageAlt: Blinken clear coat cans on the modern VK filling line

items.title: Experienced Manufacturer
items.desc: Serving OEM manufacturers, bus bodybuilders, car assembly plants, and automotive refinish workshops.

items.title: Integrated Business Model
items.desc: From R&D and production to distribution and technical support — everything under one roof for seamless service.

items.title: Deep Local Expertise
items.desc: 45+ years of understanding Indonesian climate, regulations, industry needs, and market dynamics.

items.title: Long-Term Growth Partner
items.desc: VK invests in capacity development and relationship maintenance — a partner you can grow with for decades.

ctaBand.label: Partner With Us
ctaBand.heading: 45+ years of coating expertise, ready for your next project.
